name: Risotto
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onion in margarine until tender.
2. Add rice and stir until the margarine is absorbed.
3. Stir in broth or chicken bouillon.
4. Place mixture in a 2-quart casserole dish.
5. Bake at 350 degrees in an oven uncovered for 30 minutes, or until liquid is absorbed and rice is tender.
6. Remove from oven.
7. Stir in Parmesan cheese until well blended.
8. Serve as an accompaniment to chicken or veal. Serves 4.
